title: linaria bipartita subsp. affougueurensis
intro: Linaria bipartita subsp. affougueurensis is a subspecies of the Linaria bipartita plant, a type of toadflax that is native to the Sahel region of Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Linaria bipartita subsp. affougueurensis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a wound healer and antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions or decoctions, which can be taken internally or applied topically to the affected area.
